_meta.title: Sparkfolio Framework Single Source of Truth (SSoT) Facts Registry
_meta.description: Exhaustive, centralized, auditable registry of all numerical, tax, regulatory, legal, and academic facts across the Sparkfolio Framework.

sebi_rule_lifecycle_funds.val: SEBI replaced solution-oriented schemes with "Life Cycle Funds" in 2026 to automatically calibrate glide paths.
sebi_rule_lifecycle_funds.label: SEBI 2026 Life Cycle Funds Rule

study_spiva_active_largecap.val: SPIVA India Scorecards consistently show that most active large-cap funds fail to beat the market over the long term.
study_spiva_active_largecap.label: SPIVA India Large-Cap Outperformance Scorecard

cap_epf_tax_free_employee.label: EPF/VPF Tax-Free Annual Employee Contribution Ceiling

cap_epf_tax_free_no_employer.label: EPF Tax-Free Ceiling without Employer Contribution

cap_ulip_tax_free_2_5l.label: ULIP Tax-Free Annual Premium Cap (Issued post Feb 1, 2021)

cap_traditional_life_tax_free_5l.label: Traditional Life Policy Tax-Free Annual Premium Cap (Issued post Apr 1, 2023)

tax_sgb_secondary_rule.val: SGBs purchased in the secondary market no longer qualify for the capital gains exemption at maturity (taxed at 12.5% LTCG); only original subscribers receive tax-free maturity.
tax_sgb_secondary_rule.label: Secondary SGB Maturity Tax Exemption Rule
tax_sgb_secondary_rule.authority: Finance Act / Income Tax Act Sec 47

tax_psu_bonds_sec10_15.label: PSU Tax-Free Bond Coupon Interest Exemption Section

tax_slab_max_rate.label: Peak Income Tax Slab Rate (including 4% Cess)

legal_sc_nominee_judgment.label: Nominee Legal Status Landmark SC Judgment

legal_nominee_fiduciary_rule.val: A nominee is strictly an agent or trustee appointed for administrative convenience. Once they receive the assets, they hold them in a strictly fiduciary capacity until rightful legal heirs establish their claim.
legal_nominee_fiduciary_rule.label: Fiduciary Nature of Nominees

math_compounding_1st_vs_2nd_crore.val: A ₹20k monthly SIP at 12% takes ~15.5 years for the first ₹1 Crore, but the second ₹1 Crore is generated in just over 5 years.
math_compounding_1st_vs_2nd_crore.label: Math of Early Action & Compounding

study_vanguard_lumpsum_vs_sip.val: Vanguard studies show that investing a Lump Sum immediately beats spreading it out (SIP) about 67% of the time because markets rise more than they fall.
study_vanguard_lumpsum_vs_sip.label: Vanguard Lump Sum vs SIP Research

study_vanguard_vlcm_crossover.val: Vanguard's VLCM research shows that accumulated financial capital overtakes remaining human capital in your 40s.
study_vanguard_vlcm_crossover.label: Vanguard Human Capital Crossover

study_dalbar_behavior_gap.val: Studies (like DALBAR) consistently show that average investors underperform the market by simply reacting to news and panic selling.
study_dalbar_behavior_gap.label: DALBAR Behaviour Gap Study

health_base_topup_recommendation.val: Tier-1 city residents should hold a Base Cover of ₹10 Lakh paired with a Super Top-Up of ₹30 Lakh to ₹50 Lakh (carrying a ₹10 Lakh deductible).
health_base_topup_recommendation.label: Healthcare Liability Insulation Recommendation

rule_home_loan_prepay_emi_30_percent.label: Home Loan EMI Net Income Ceiling

rule_active_fund_underperformance_exit.label: Active Fund Rolling Return Exit Benchmark
